name: meta-ads-audit
description: Meta Ads (Facebook + Instagram) account audit and business context setup. Run this first — it gathers business information, analyzes account health, and saves context that all other Meta ads skills reuse. Trigger on "audit my Meta ads", "audit my Facebook ads", "Meta ads audit", "set up my Meta ads", "onboard Meta", "Meta account overview", "how's my Meta account", "Meta health check", "what should I fix in my Facebook ads", or when the user is new to NotFair Meta and hasn't run an audit before.
author: nowork-studio
summary_zh: 一键体检 Facebook 和 Instagram 广告账户，收集业务背景并诊断账户健康度，新接入投放或想摸清账户现状时先跑一遍，后续其他 Meta 广告工具都能直接复用这些信息。
